assertions.description: U1 (MIC5353-3.3YMT-TR) is a 3.3V LDO but power_regulators list is empty. The same miss occurs in LPLink_Nano (also uses MIC5353-3.3YMT-TR as U3). The lib_id is the full part number from a local library, which the analyzer apparently does not match against any regulator pattern. Both designs have this miss.
